headline.text: L1 down to *10 PECO pallets* and L2 missing layflat caddies until 7/27 — both lines at risk of stoppage

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 2 ran almond cluster all three shifts but fought line-speed accumulation at the check weigher and x-ray during second shift. PECO pallet supply dropped to 10 units by 18:30 with no delivery confirmed until Thursday.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS ran three shifts with three brief stoppages for blade and film issues, all cleared inside 30 minutes. Layflat caddies for item 40944 confirmed delayed until 7/27, forcing a line-down decision.
per_plant_summary.L3: MF Matrix had a busy 24 hours: two bucket calibrations (one span cal down 1 hour), printer ink alignment, and recurring weight-related bag ejections from 23:35 through window close. Foreign material found in WIP boxes at 23:25 with no resolution. Truffle line accumulating doubles — 4 bins reported at 06:46.

notes.text: Ray Garcia noted electrician scheduled Monday morning to inspect and set up ML4 mixer.
Joey Dudney reported 940 Hershey PECO pallets at L2; 200 sent to L3, discussing whether to send 200 to L1.
Chamber tour scheduled 11:45 on Thursday — Curt Willis ensuring L1 tour-ready, Alan Todd checking L2.

resolved.title: FFS silver line appearing on front of pouch
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 15:08 for silver line defect on pouch front, maintenance working on issue.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:27 — "Line is running" after Brandon Lance corrected film wrap that was bent behind photo eye sensor B11 (Mathew Draper, Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML2 temper unit faulting during reheat
resolved.summary: Temper unit continued to fault out while attempting reheat cycle.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 11:58 — Dave Ruff walked through and Adrien confirmed "it was good" (Dave Ruff).

resolved.title: FFS blade cleaning at 16:58
resolved.summary: Maintenance cleaning machine blades on FFS line during second shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:14 — "The blade is clean. Line is running!" (VFFS).

resolved.title: FFS blade maintenance at 02:26
resolved.summary: Line paused during third shift for scheduled blade maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 02:34 — "Line is back up and good to go" (Zack Kurtz).

resolved.title: MFM buckets 7 and 10 not running, needed span calibration
resolved.summary: Buckets 7 and 10 stopped running at 10:19, Troy Baxter performed span calibration with Nathan Ruiz and Shawn Jewkes, line down approximately 1 hour.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 11:11 — "7 and 10 are now working again" after span calibration on both buckets (Nathan Ruiz, Troy Baxter).

resolved.title: MFM upper product feeding sensors causing weight issues
resolved.summary: Buckets not opening properly and upper feeding sensors being hit by product, causing weight problems at shift start.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:38 — Shawn adjusted sensor angles so they don't get hit by product while still pointing at center, "seems to help a lot" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: Videojet printer fault, printhead full of ink
resolved.summary: Printer shut down at 11:20 with fault code requiring printhead cleaning; printhead was full of ink and needed alignment adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 11:48 — "Running" after Nathan Ruiz cleaned printhead and corrected alignment; ink jet was shooting off to side creating mess (Itzel Chavez, Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: MFM weight issue causing continuous bag rejection at 00:44
resolved.summary: Matrix stopped at 00:44 due to weight issue causing continuous bag rejection, maintenance called, line down 10 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 00:56 — "The operator resolved the weight issue, and production resumed after a 10 minute downtime" (mfmatrix).

resolved.title: MFM bucket 21 staying open due to latch problem
resolved.summary: Bucket 21 remained open and would not close properly, maintenance called to investigate.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:26 — "Bucket is back on, maintenance said some of the latches weren't on correctly which was causing a small problem" (Nathan Gevenois).

needs_attention.title: PECO pallet inventory critically low, down to 10 units
needs_attention.summary: Expected delivery of 2 FTLs (1,080 pallets) did not arrive; warehouse down to 10 PECO pallets as of 18:30, will need to use regular pallets if supply exhausted.
needs_attention.status: Kirk Nickel following up with supplier at 19:21, expects delivery won't happen until Thursday 7/24.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 line speed causing accumulation at check weigher and x-ray
needs_attention.summary: Running at 97 pouches/minute with one check weigher creates bottleneck; second shift reported over-accumulation, 20+ pouches falling into x-ray bin every 10 minutes, EEs overwhelmed.
needs_attention.status: Conner Boyd paused line at 20:03 to clear accumulation and planned speed timing adjustment on check weigher belt; no confirmation of sustained improvement.

needs_attention.title: Layflat caddy shortage (item 40944) delaying production until 7/27
needs_attention.summary: Zero quantity on hand for item 40944 layflat caddies; confirmed delivery delayed from 7/22 to 7/27, forcing line-down decision after current materials exhausted.
needs_attention.status: Alan Todd confirmed at 17:18 that caddies won't arrive until 7/27; scheduling meeting held, line will stay down without material.

needs_attention.title: Foreign material found in WIP boxes
needs_attention.summary: Kimberly Morales reported foreign material contamination in work-in-process boxes at 23:25.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 23:25 with no follow-up resolution or FSQA disposition by window close.

needs_attention.title: MFM continues ejecting bags due to recurring weight issues
needs_attention.summary: Matrix paused multiple times overnight for bag ejections; 04:37 report shows line paused again for 5 minutes, continues to eject bags, maintenance called.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 04:37, basket monitoring assigned at 23:43, but ejections continuing as of last message in window.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line producing high volume of doubles
needs_attention.summary: Truffle enrober accumulating double pieces — 4 bins of doubles reported at 06:46 with no root cause identified.
needs_attention.status: 4 bins accumulated as of 06:46; no follow-up on cause or corrective action by window close.
